final_response:
Short answer: no — not this quarter. On 2026-04-15 we accepted a decision restricting all four Q2 engineering hires to mid-level (3–7 years). No staff or senior staff recs are open this quarter, and recruiting was already directed to decline senior+ candidates with a 'not this round' note. The decision is set to be re-evaluated at Q3 planning.

Context from the entry: cofounder had advocated for one senior staff hire, but CEO and CTO preferred a more balanced team and training capacity at mid-level over high-leverage staff hires for the next two quarters. Compensation bands are frozen at mid-level for these reqs.

If this candidate is genuinely exceptional, the options are: (a) ask recruiting to keep them warm for a Q3 reconsideration, or (b) escalate to CEO/CTO for an explicit exception logged against the 2026-04-15 decision. We shouldn't open the rec unilaterally — that would silently reverse a settled decision.

Reference: decisions.md → 2026-04-15 — Restrict initial hiring to mid-level engineers only (status: accepted).

actions.content_summary: Workspace orientation: layout (decisions.md, observations.md, daybook/, projects/, runbooks/, resources/, tmp/), workflow discipline, canonical strings.
Single accepted decision dated 2026-04-15 restricting all Q2 hires to mid-level (3–7 yrs); no staff/senior staff recs; re-evaluate at Q3.
Prior daybook: vendor renegotiation and platform team unblock; no in-flight critical items; next session may pick up security audit prep.
Daybook conventions: Intent/Log/Handoff sections, Guardrails sub-section for boundary instructions, Generated-by provenance marker.

Today's daybook: Intent (respond to recruiting question), Log (decision lookup and answer), Handoff with Guardrails forbidding senior/staff rec opens absent explicit reversal. Generated-by: inference.

notes: User's question was a cold-pickup recall task — answer lived in decisions.md (2026-04-15 entry).
Did not need to consult projects/, observations.md, runbooks/, or resources/ for this question.
Created today's daybook (2026-05-17) per workspace convention since this session produced work.
Added a Guardrails sub-section to the handoff to prevent a future cold session from opening a senior-level rec without an explicit reversal of the 2026-04-15 decision.
Did not modify decisions.md — the standing decision constrains action and was not reversed in this session.
